CScriptMan::OnAskMenu#AskMenu.notes: v79 CScriptMan::OnAskMenu@0x6c8863 merged the avatar-style menu into ASK_MENU: DecodeStr(message) + Decode1(count) + Decode4 x count (avatar look ids, SetUtilDlgEx_AVATAR). v83 @0x746fad / v95 @0x6dce00 read a plain single string with no count. Atlas uses ASK_MENU only for plain #L# text menus -> count=0, no styles. msgType byte routing this handler is 7 in v79 (4 in v83, 5 in v95).

calls.comment: count (avatar look ids; 0 for plain #L# text menus)

CShopDlg::OnPacket#GenericError.notes: v79 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x6d6eb9 (op 284) sole data-bearing arm = mode 14 (v18==1): Decode1(hasReason); hasReason==0 -> plain notice (no string). Atlas ShopOperationGenericError writes Byte(mode)+Bool(false). Mode 14 per npc_shop_operation.yaml (gms_v79). No Decode4 anywhere in v79 -> OVER/UNDER_LEVEL version-absent.

calls.comment: hasReason flag (0 for plain GENERIC_ERROR; no reason string follows)

CShopDlg::OnPacket#GenericErrorWithReaso.notes: v79 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x6d6eb9 (op 284) mode 14 (v18==1): Decode1(hasReason)!=0 -> DecodeStr(reason) shown as Notice. Atlas ShopOperationGenericErrorWithReason writes Byte(mode)+Bool(true)+AsciiString(reason). Mode 14 per npc_shop_operation.yaml (gms_v79).

calls.comment: reason (DecodeStr; shown as the Notice text)
